forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 8b5cf6
+description: 'Right-docked AI panel on the main layer of the Kanban app. Built with AI Elements; the Tauri backend acts as a proper ACP Client (Client::builder + handlers) and talks to the agent strictly over ACP (Claude Code or local llama). The kanban tool is exposed as a per-board in-process HTTP MCP server and delivered via NewSessionRequest.mcp_servers. Stateless chat — fresh ACP session each time. Full spec: ideas/kanban/ai_panel.md'
+name: AI Panel
